subcodes.first_line: O Abdullah! Thy letter hath indeed been presented before thy Lord, and the glance of His favors hath been directed towards it. Verily, He is the All-Hearing, the All-Responding [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبدالله قد حضر کتابک بین یدی ربک و توجه الیه طرف الالطاف انه لهو السامع المجیب
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
